entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: The cereal crop being studied for rust resistance

entities.name: LEAF RUST
entities.description: A fungal disease causing biotic constraints and economic losses in wheat

entities.name: YELLOW RUST
entities.description: Also known as stripe rust, a fungal disease affecting wheat

entities.name: HOST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of wheat to resist rust diseases

entities.name: NEW DELHI
entities.description: Location of ICAR-IARI facilities where experiments were conducted

entities.name: SHIMLA
entities.description: Location of ICAR-IIWBR Regional Station where experiments were conducted

entities.name: MULTI-ENVIRONMENT PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of characterizing traits across different environments

entities.name: SEEDLING STAGE
entities.description: The early growth stage used for resistance characterization

entities.name: ADULT PLANT STAGE
entities.description: The mature growth stage used for resistance characterization

entities.name: GENE-MATCHING TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A method using multi-pathotypes data to identify specific resistance genes

entities.name: MULTI-PATHOTYPES DATA
entities.description: Data used in gene-matching to identify resistance genes

entities.name: YR GENES
entities.description: Yellow rust resistance genes including YrA, Yr2, Yr9, Yr18, and Yr27

entities.name: LR GENES
entities.description: Leaf rust resistance genes including Lr1, Lr3, Lr10, Lr13, Lr19, Lr23, Lr26, and Lr34

entities.name: EXOTIC WHEAT GENOTYPES
entities.description: Genetic materials including PG, GS, and CIMCOG panels

entities.name: SLOW RUSTING RESISTANCE
entities.description: A type of resistance observed at the adult plant stage

entities.name: HOST RESPONSE
entities.description: Parameter used to assess adult plant slow rusting resistance

entities.name: EPIDEMIOLOGICAL PARAMETERS
entities.description: Parameters used to assess adult plant slow rusting resistance

entities.name: NON-RACE-SPECIFIC RESISTANCE GENES
entities.description: Genes that provide resistance to multiple pathotypes

entities.name: HYBRIDIZATION PROGRAMS
entities.description: Breeding programs aimed at enhancing rust resistance
